_meta.description: Registry of fully auto-generated documentation files (i.e. files where a CI / Make pipeline overwrites the contents on every build). The list mirrors the SKIP set in scripts/generate_doc_references.py and is consumed by scripts/audit_auto_gen_provenance.py to ensure every entry's header carries an honest 'Generated by ...' provenance banner so readers know not to hand-edit. New auto-generated docs MUST be added here AND to the SKIP set above; this is enforced by the audit.

schema.generator: command or script that produces this file (matched after normalising runner prefixes like 'python3' / 'python -m')
schema.inputs: list of data files / paths consumed
schema._note: optional human-readable comment about the entry

CHANGELOG.md._note: CHANGELOG.md is hand-authored; the SKIP entry exists because the format is constrained (Keep-a-Changelog) and the references-footer generator would otherwise disturb the format.

VERSION._note: VERSION is a single-line semver token, no body for citations.

docs/uc-migration-report.md._note: Frozen historical record from the cat-22 migration (Phase 1.3); not regenerated.
